stable.description: Object identity persists across sessions and updates.

volatile.description: Object identity may change or reset depending on world state.

fixed.description: Object identity is immutable and cannot change.

template.description: Object serves as a structural template for other objects.

omnipresent.description: Object exists across all scenes and contexts.

user_authored.description: Content is written by the user and must not be altered.

ephemeral.description: Object exists only during error or transient states.
